channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Badenoch dismisses Starmer’s warning to tech firms and says social media ban for under-16s would be ‘much simpler’ - UK politics live
item.description: Badenoch dismisses Starmer’s warning to tech firms and says social media ban for under-16s would be ‘much simpler’ - UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
item.description: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Minister says Hegseth ‘lacking in class’ over migration comments at D-Day memorial
item.description: Minister says Hegseth ‘lacking in class’ over migration comments at D-Day memorial

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Social media ban latest: Starmer urged to go ‘much further’ after companies given deadline to protect children
item.description: Social media ban latest: Starmer urged to go ‘much further’ after companies given deadline to protect children

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer preparing to announce social media restrictions for children
item.description: Starmer preparing to announce social media restrictions for children

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer gives tech firms ultimatum to block explicit images on children’s phones - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer gives tech firms ultimatum to block explicit images on children’s phones - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham shares footage of man tearing down campaign posters ahead of Makerfield by-election
item.description: Andy Burnham shares footage of man tearing down campaign posters ahead of Makerfield by-election

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Keir Starmer’s speech on nudity apps encapsulates much of Labour’s MPs frustration with him. “Ultimatums” rather than action. Talk big, act small. Perhaps you then eventually do act big but not without losing an awf...
item.description: Keir Starmer’s speech on nudity apps encapsulates much of Labour’s MPs frustration with him. “Ultimatums” rather than action. Talk big, act small. Perhaps you then eventually do act big but not without losing an awf...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How would Starmer’s social media ban for under-16s work in the UK?
item.description: How would Starmer’s social media ban for under-16s work in the UK?

item.title: i Politics: The 'mistake' that could jeopardise Burnham's hopes of becoming PM
item.description: The 'mistake' that could jeopardise Burnham's hopes of becoming PM
